items.title: Scheduled Research Cycle Report Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle report for May 12, 2026, has been published, detailing the review of 9 candidates and the decision to hold SOL due to its deep liquidity and credible signals. Notably, 8 new listings were skipped based on risk assessments, highlighting the importance of cautious investment strategies. The report is now available in the `reports` directory.
